# Preferences

## Communication

Direct and concise. Lead with the recommendation, then the reasoning. No
corporate filler.

## Tools

Lives in Notion, Linear, and Slack. Uses Figma for design reviews.

## Workflow

Deep-work mornings, meetings after 2pm. Prefers written updates over calls.
